title: Python async concurrency
body: Python async programming keeps API calls non-blocking while handling many requests at once.
author: Alice
text: Python async concurrency. Python async programming keeps API calls non-blocking while handling many requests at once.

title: Java multithreading
body: Java multithreading handles concurrent API requests in worker threads.
author: Bob
text: Java multithreading. Java multithreading handles concurrent API requests in worker threads.

title: ChromaDB persistence
body: A persistent ChromaDB client writes embeddings to disk so collections survive restarts.
author: Chen
text: ChromaDB persistence. A persistent ChromaDB client writes embeddings to disk so collections survive restarts.

title: Pinecone hosted indexes
body: Pinecone is a hosted vector database with serverless indexes managed in the cloud.
author: Dana
text: Pinecone hosted indexes. Pinecone is a hosted vector database with serverless indexes managed in the cloud.

title: Metadata filtering
body: Metadata filters on source, date, category, and author raise precision by removing off-topic chunks.
author: Alice
text: Metadata filtering. Metadata filters on source, date, category, and author raise precision by removing off-topic chunks.

title: Hybrid search
body: Hybrid search combines sparse keyword retrieval with dense vector retrieval and reranks the merged candidates.
author: Eli
text: Hybrid search. Hybrid search combines sparse keyword retrieval with dense vector retrieval and reranks the merged candidates.

title: Cross encoder reranking
body: A cross encoder scores a query and document together, making it slower but often more accurate than bi-encoder retrieval.
author: Sam
text: Cross encoder reranking. A cross encoder scores a query and document together, making it slower but often more accurate than bi-encoder retrieval.

title: Retrieval quality metrics
body: Recall@k checks coverage, precision@k checks returned quality, MRR rewards the first hit, and NDCG uses graded relevance and rank.
author: Priya
text: Retrieval quality metrics. Recall@k checks coverage, precision@k checks returned quality, MRR rewards the first hit, and NDCG uses graded relevance and rank.

title: BM25 sparse search
body: BM25 and TF-IDF are sparse methods that rely on exact token overlap and work well for keyword-heavy queries.
author: Noa
text: BM25 sparse search. BM25 and TF-IDF are sparse methods that rely on exact token overlap and work well for keyword-heavy queries.

title: Dense embeddings
body: Dense vector embeddings capture semantic similarity and can match paraphrases even when exact keywords differ.
author: Noa
text: Dense embeddings. Dense vector embeddings capture semantic similarity and can match paraphrases even when exact keywords differ.

title: Query rewriting
body: Query expansion helps recall, while segmentation and scoping improve precision when the wording is ambiguous.
author: Mina
text: Query rewriting. Query expansion helps recall, while segmentation and scoping improve precision when the wording is ambiguous.

title: Python observability
body: Python logging records structured events and is commonly filtered by source and author in observability systems.
author: Alice
